problem.title: LiTAMIN2 throughput and accuracy trade-off on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: Which LiTAMIN2 profile should stay as the current default on a deeper HDL-400 public reference set without collapsing the exploration space to one implementation?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Fast local-map + covariance
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default with recent/local-map pruning and covariance-aware cost.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Close enough to the current default to keep as a live alternative.

variants.label: Fast local-map + ICP-only
variants.intent: Remove the covariance-shape term while keeping the same fast local-map profile.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool. Covariance-shape term disabled.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + covariance
variants.intent: Move closer to the paper's 3 m profile while preserving the same benchmark interface.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + ICP-only
variants.intent: Use the paper-like 3 m profile, but isolate the first cost term by disabling covariance cost.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool. Covariance-shape term disabled.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
